title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Philips India Healthcare

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Philips India Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Philips India Healthcare in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Philips India Healthcare:
Philips India Healthcare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Philips India Healthcare!
